summary: Final red-team closure for H01. Routing authority is encapsulated; gate-evidence validation is structural; indirect bypass is detected at preflight; replay attempts fail at the artifact-store seam. No S2+ findings remain.

findings.description: Pre-H01B routing entrypoint allowed routing without gate evidence.
findings.recommendation: Remove the public entrypoint; require gate evidence via route_with_gate_evidence.

findings.description: Indirect routing bypass via wrappers, helpers, and re-exports of _route_artifact_unchecked was undetected by preflight.
findings.recommendation: Add ROUTING_BYPASS_ATTEMPT detection covering direct calls, imports, re-exports, and public route_artifact aliases.

findings.description: Gate-evidence validation accepted empty / non-string eval_summary_id and non-string gate_status, allowing structurally weak evidence to pass.
findings.recommendation: Require eval_summary_id to be a non-empty string and gate_status to be a string before status-set membership checks.

findings.description: Replay integrity coverage did not assert that mutated payload + reused gate evidence is rejected at the artifact-store seam.
findings.recommendation: Add end-to-end replay tests covering payload mutation, gate-evidence reuse, conditional gate upgrade, and artifact_id swap.

findings.description: route_with_gate_evidence accepted a non-dict artifact and silently coerced artifact_type to None, masking malformed input.
findings.recommendation: Reject non-dict artifacts with INVALID_ARTIFACT_ENVELOPE before any further validation.
